pr.title: Record: LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1194 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP stack with Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon optimizer, followed by score-first Legal TTT per 32K validation chunk.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal TTT trains on validation chunks after scoring each chunk with torch.inference_mode(), so the adaptation only touches validation data.
techniques: Score-first Legal TTT doing 3-epoch SGD per 32K-token validation chunk
Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon optimizer pipeline
